title: Cinematic Literary Short Film Key Art AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic Literary Short Film Key Art AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Cinematic short-film key art for The Library of Unsent Letters, centered on a quiet young archivist carrying a bundle of sealed letters inside an old private library filled with shelves of unsent letters. Subject: a quiet young archivist carrying a bundle of sealed letters moves through an old private library filled with shelves of unsent letters, surrounded by floating envelopes, half-open drawers, handwritten pages, and soft dust-lit memories that suggests an intimate story built from unsent messages. Scene: an old private library filled with shelves of unsent letters feels coherent and story-driven, with shelves, sealed envelopes, handwritten papers, dust motes, soft shadows, and a quiet sense of memory. Composition: Fixed vertical cinematic poster still with a central walking figure, deep aisle perspective, letter-covered foreground details, warm light pools, and clean negative space for atmosphere rather than typography. Style: Elegant cinematic realism with literary fantasy restraint, long-form story atmosphere, polished film-still color grading, realistic paper texture, and gentle emotional pacing. Color Palette: Fixed warm amber paper tones, dark walnut shelves, muted cream envelopes, soft gray-blue shadows, and a faint golden backlight. Lighting: Soft archive-window glow, dust-filled shafts of light, small warm lamp pools, and quiet shadow falloff around the shelves. Signature Elements: The Library of Unsent Letters as a visual concept, unsent letters, sealed envelopes, archive shelves, memory fragments, and a coherent cinematic story mood. Restrictions: Keep the image text-free, poster-clean, unbranded, coherent, character-consistent, and focused on the literary atmosphere.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
